name: @conceptkernel/cklib
description: Attach JS hosts, tools and agents to a Concept Kernel — governed verbs, sealed provenance, typed reads over NATS-WSS + JWT (CKP v3.9 dispatch-only; vendored, air-gapped)

scripts.check: node --check ck.js && node --check ck-client.js && node --check ck-store.js
scripts.test: npm run check && node tests/smoke-ck.mjs && node tests/smoke-ck-store.mjs && node tests/smoke-ck-client.mjs

author: Peter Styk <peter@styk.tv>
